description_long: This object consists of two adjacent modern apartment buildings, each with a boxy, geometric design and flat roofs. The buildings are primarily finished in a combination of black and white, with large rectangular windows and multiple balconies visible on the upper floors. The structures are set on green, landscaped plots with angular patterns, and are surrounded by low black boundary walls. The buildings feature multiple levels, with clear separations between floors and outdoor terrace spaces. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with a strong emphasis on clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The arrangement suggests a multi-family residential complex, likely designed for urban or suburban environments.
description: A pair of modern, boxy apartment buildings with flat roofs, black and white facades, large windows, and landscaped green plots.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facades, large windows, balconies, and landscaped green areas in front of both buildings.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back sides of the buildings, with fewer windows and more solid wall surfaces.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the staggered arrangement of balconies and terraces, as well as the angular landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view, similar to view 1, showing the back facades and the extent of the green plots.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern with large rectangular panes, providing symmetry and consistent spacing across the facades.
